MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Eric A. Grover of Keller Grover (543.1305) for plaintiffs and moving parties
Joshua Cliffe of Littler Mendelson (677.3122) for defendant and responding party

PLAINTIFFS CURTIS IRELAND AND MICHAEL LARA'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT. Discussed and the Court ruled as follows: Preliminary approval of settlement is granted. Final Fairness Hearing to be set for June 2, 2010 in Department 502. Parties were directed to see the court clerk in department 502 to confirm the hearing date and time. Order signed in open Court. (301/AJR) Judge A. James Robertson II, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
